Hi, my name is

Emeka Osuji.

{/*
*/}

Front End Developer & UI Designer

I am a developer and designer of web and mobile apps.
Currently, I spend most of my time honing my development &
design skills and also becoming a better human.

About Me

Hiya! My name is Emeka Osuji and I have a passion for creating awesome software experiences. My journey began in 2018 when I took the initiative to help a friend design her album cover art. This single act led me to learning about Graphic Design with Photoshop and Adobe Illustrator. I later went on to learn UI Design with Adobe XD. I took great interest in how the web works and this curiosity started my journey in web development.

Fast-forward to today, I’ve had the privilege of working with the following technologies:

HTML & CSS

SASS

BOOTSTRAP

JAVASCRIPT

REACT JS

GIT

Projects I've Worked On

Featured Project

Heyward Group

A web redesign and relaunch project for Heyward Group. This is by far one of the most challenging projects I’ve worked on! I was responsible for creating a fresh look for their old website and later worked closely with the senior developer to develop this amazing website.

Adobe XD

HTML

SASS

Bootstrap

Wordpress

PHP

Mobile Responsive
